name: Greenville Legal
message: David R. Price, Jr., P.A. is a personal injury law firm based in Greenville, South Carolina, specializing in a wide range of legal matters including auto accidents, wrongful death, and workers' compensation. They offer comprehensive legal representation for individuals and families impacted by personal injury and criminal defense cases. The firm has a strong track record of success, having recovered millions for clients and being recognized as Best Law Firm multiple times. Their dedicated team is committed to providing personalized legal services and ensuring clients receive the justice they deserve.
